excerpts.products: voluntarily recalling 25 lb sacks of fresh yellow onions

excerpts.facility_names: packed at the company's Golden Valley Packing #2 facility in Salinas, California
excerpts.distribution_regions: distributed to wholesalers, foodservice distributors, food banks, and institutional customers in California and Nevada
excerpts.pathogen: potential to be contaminated with Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli O157:H7)
